title: Image generation (Nano Banana)
summary: Generate an image from a text prompt with the Nano Banana family. Output arrives as inline image bytes on response.candidates[0].content.parts.
notes: response_modalities=['IMAGE'] is required; without it the model may answer in text.
For studio-grade 4K, use gemini-3-pro-image-preview. For high throughput / batched generation, prefer gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview or gemini-2.5-flash-image.
Imagen 4 is a separate dedicated text-to-image surface — see the docs link if you need that engine instead.
